game.short_text: Submission for the 2023 Winter Melon Jam. VR Horror game for Meta Quest.
game.title: C.H.A.R.M.

details.title: C.H.A.R.M.
details.description: This was a project created for the 2023 Winter Melon Jam. The purpose of the game is to take the role of a member of C.H.A.R.M. (Catastrophic and Hostile Anomaly Reality Management) and find each anomaly that appears in the gas station before they become permanent. Press 'a' to switch your flashlight into blacklight mode, allowing you to return a fresh anomaly to it's normal state, fail to find and secure the anomaly within 30 seconds and the threads of reality will grow thin. If three anomalies manage to become permanent, the game has been lost, survive the duration of the event without this happening and you've successfully completed your mission. Made for Meta Quest.

game.title: Succubus Red
game.short_text: They may fight but no one resists to the succubus

details.title: Succubus Red
details.description:
IF YOU ARE LOST PLEASE READ THE CARD AND ENEMY DESCRIPTIONS 
PERSONAL BEST : 45875!


        Introduction
 Succubus Red ! Hordes of soldiers from the Black Cross are comming to take you down for the (c)harm you caused to the people ot their kingdom. While you cannot Damage enemies directly you can however use their perversion against them, charm them and watch how they kill each other. Good Luck !  
    

        How to play
        You get cards every few secconds, use them wisely to control the enemies. 
        
            Left Click : Select/Deselect Card
            Right Click: Place Card at cursor/ Discard a certain card (Cost half the charm)
        Enemies close to you will sacrifice themselves to damage you ! 
    

        Cards
      
Cards have a Charm cost and a Level, each card increases a random stat with each level gained (range, amount of health restored, etc.), gain charm over time and by killing enemies.
Discarding a card costs a part of the cards charm but replaces it with a new one.
        
            Love Totem: Makes a zone of love that charms light units inside
            Love Bomb: Will shatter on the ground and charm all nearby units for a long duration (even the Juggernauts) 
            Bandage Heart: Heals your player (Highest cost card)
            Bloody Upgrade: Prompts the player to upgrade one of two cards (this also happens naturally every once in a while)


        Enemies
      
The difficulty scale increases with time, here are the enemies that you can encounter across different formations :
        
            Knight : The standard unit
            Archer: Can shoot from a distance
            Juggernaut: The heaviest unit, it resists to some charms

    


        Thank You
        If you enjoyed this game please leave a rating or a comment ! Everything in this project was made by me in 72 hours for the Winter Melon Game Jam 2023, excepted for :
              
            Lean Tween :  Unity asset to move UI smoothly

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.7 out of 5 stars(6 total ratings)

details.title: Monster Parlor
details.description:
Content Warnings
Unsettling imagery, very intense gore, cursing, ringing sound (music (source of the ringing) can be muted in the pause screen).
Monster Parlor is a game in which you run a beauty parlor for monsters, where you have the privilege to make them into something a bit more charming! Strike up a conversation, convince them of your ways, and earn some charms of your own.
Made in 72 hours for the 2023 Winter Melon Jam! The theme was  "charm". 
Play time: approx. 15-20 min
Disclaimer: The fixed download  and web versions were uploaded after the grace period ended. Also, the web version has had a QOL update, but not the downloadable versions.
Optional Tutorial
There is an in-game tutorial, this tutorial is just for refreshers!
In Monster Parlor you run a beauty parlor for monsters, where you make them into more palatable creatures. To do so, you must enter a conversation and lower their esteem. In it you can compliment, persuade, or berate them. In turn, they might become defensive, retaliate, or they might recover some of their esteem. Each monster also has a special ability, so watch out for that! 

A monster’s mood greatly affects how the conversation goes - from how effective your words may be, to how a monster responds to them. There are six moods: ashamed, very ashamed, enraged, very enraged, flustered, and very flustered. All monsters have different personalities, so their moods affect the conversation differently. Pay attention, learn their patterns, and you might be able to exploit a little insecurity of theirs.

If you successfully convince a monster they need to be fixed, you get a unique charm from them, which gives you a special ability! You can use one charm per turn, and each charm can only be used once per combat.
Credits
SmallBugGames - AI Programming, "Combat" Design
CoByte - UI Programming, Scrum Mastery
dogoryx - Character Art, End Sequence Illustration
MetaphysicalMonsters - Environmental & UI Art, Sound Design, Writing 
Sound effects sourced from Freesound.com - Attributions

game.short_text: Play matchmaker to find the perfect partner for your bestie!
game.title: The Love Application

details.title: The Love Application
details.description:
"These necklaces are a promise to be together. Always."
It’s tough work being the designated matchmaker for your best friend. But to Stacy, it's all worth it to make Mia happy. So when the two girls start their senior year of high school, Stacy makes it her personal mission to find Mia the perfect boyfriend. 
You play as Stacy as she creates a "boyfriend application" and tries to find the most charming, suitable boy for Mia. Along the way, will Stacy discover something about herself and take matters into her own hands, or will she rely on the application to fulfill her goal? You decide!
[Four main endings.]
Made in 72 hours by Adexia and Faernis for the 2023 Winter MelonJam!
I reccomend the downloadable version over the browser version! but if you can't download them for some reason, the browser version is there too -- it's just a little buggy.Download and unzip the file for your device (mac or windows/linux)

details.title: Glass Ninja
details.description:
As a Glass Vessel, it is your sole duty and purpose to rid the world of its evil. Don't get shattered. 
Run, gun, dodge, and dash your way through hordes of enemies, platform through an abstract world, mix and match different charms for a variety of playstyles, and face off against an ultimate evil.
Version 1.0 was made in 72 hours as part of the Winter MelonJam 2023 game jam. My first public game release.
Default Controls:
WASD to moveLeft Mouse Button to throw kunaiSpacebar to jumpE to interactTab for inventoryEscape for menuNumbers 1, 2, and 3 to use equipped charms

game.short_text: Play as a Charm Artisan who makes charm bracelets. Help clients solve their pressing problems!
game.title: Little Charm Artisan

details.title: Little Charm Artisan
details.description:
After graduating from your apprenticeship, you're finally ready to operate as an independent charm artisan - opening for business right from your very own caravan! Learn mystical sigils with a variety of energies to create charms for your clients (who are probably desperately looking for help).

Fantastic features!
Create colorful charms with simple clicks of your mouse 
Solve pressing problems for your concerned and concerning clients Master an original set of sigils that represents different powers and energiesGet paid a lot of money (?)
Assets and code were created during the period of Winter Melonjam 2023! Links of assets created by others are credited here.

How to play 
Play directly on the browser with your mouse.If you're really, really stuck - here's a guide for you to solve all your charm making problems.



Credits


Programming: Aka Art & Writing: Jintii & Salt

game.title: A Loki...?

details.title: A Loki...?
details.description:
You play as an antique shop owner named Loki. You sell various relics and hidden treasures. All of your items are bona fide, genuine, and not-fake collectables! You just gotta convince this girl that this charm is the real deal...
Made for the Winter MelonJam 2023 within 2 days. Hopefully, both the browser and the downloadable version works um. Ya! Think of this game as a real-time visual novel where your responses are timed essentially.
Note: Each playthrough is quick and it is intended to be a game that is replayed multiple times for different dialogues/endings. 
Controls
Enter - Continue/select
Arrow Keys - Change selection

Welcome To my Melon jam entry!

After acquiring the charm ability, double jump near an NPC to charm them with your cool moves.
The speed-run update:
Some small quality of life updates that includes: 
Bigger dialogue text size.Options menu + Pause menu to change volume and  full screen.You can activate the speed-run timer and Skip cut-scenes in Pause/options menu.Quick restart: activates Speed-run timer, spawns you in the first room and skip the First two tutorial cut-scenes and gives you the double jump directly. Level design changes to make some jumping sections less annoying.

details.title: The Bosta Bar
details.description:
!!!!!! PLAY ON FULLSCREEN !!!!!!
  The Bosta Bar is a stealth/persuation game created in 3 days by the Faceleste Studio for the Melon Jam 2023 with the theme "Charm". In the game, you follow a pair of thieves that, by distracting their victims, perform burglaries inside a bar.



Developers of The Bosta Bar 
RafaelProgrammingGiovanniArtsJoãoProgrammingThomasArts & Sounds

⬇️  -CONTROLS-  ⬇️
A - move to the leftD - move to the rightF - stealing (Hold it until the message pops up! We found a bug where the progress bar becomes invisible)E - change character
⬇️  -MECHANICS -   ⬇️
From time to time the victim will look back, noticing Donny's strange and imposing presence, he'll look more often if your sus-o-meter is too high.
Paul can use his charm to talk to the victim, choosing the best option will make the sus-o-meter go down, making it safer for Donny to steal.
When approaching a pillar or a table, Donny will automatically hide behind the object, the victim won't be able to see him.
The symbol of ! means the victim is about to look back, wait for the ! to disappear before leaving the hiding spot.
Donny needs to hold the "F" button near the victim for 3 seconds in order to steal what they have, then go back to the entrance. (As mentioned before, we found a bug where the button disappears after the first 2 seconds, but continue holding until the dialogue shows up).
                                                                               FINAL NOTE:
The game was made in 72 hours to the MelonJam. There were some ideas that we've had that were not present in the final project due to the lack of time. We've seen a lot of potential in the idea. That, and the people that enjoyed our game makes us consider the idea of working on more updates, and, maybe, releasing a more ambitious version of The Bosta Bar. (name yet to be confirmed)
